memory_writeback.$note: S3 appended 2 lessons to memory/architect.md. S4: nothing-reusable (existing lesson applied). S5: appended idempotency-vs-equivalence TC design lesson to memory/qa/v2-001-delta-filter.md.

phase_history.key_outcome: Delta filter spec: 8 new ACs + MODIFIED AC-7-011; delta = pre-mark_seen snapshot, config-gated [delta] enabled default true; 14 edge cases; STRIDE skipped (no new attack surface).

9 ACs (8 CONFIRMED + 1 ASSUMED), 6 happy + 3 error path; 4 BRs + 1 INT DEFINED (were dangling refs); added AC-V2-001-009 (StateError surfacing); spec-auditor PASS (C1-C6), openspec validate PASS. MODIFIED AC-7-011 header matches living spec verbatim. Follow-up: added AC-V2-001-010 (mark_seen-count invariant, R1 hardening) -> 10 ACs, 7 happy + 3 error.

4 ADRs, 0 endpoints (CLI, no openapi.yaml), 22 tasks / 2 checkpoints. R1 solved structurally (_partition_new inline before mark_seen); AC-009 solved by omission (StateError propagates, no try/except); AC-007 mirrors _validate_lookback bool-trap. cross-artifact-audit 0 CRITICAL (10/10 ACs covered), openspec validate PASS.

coverage 98.55%, 22/22 tasks, 0 design deviations (1 implementation decision: fixed 12 pre-existing test fixtures). Branch feature/V2-001-delta-filter created (base feature/7-scheduler-cli-7). All 10 delta ACs + AC-7-010/011/019 covered by name-referenced tests. R1 tripwire + StateError-propagation + byte-identical-delta-off tests all green. openspec change validate PASS.

GO — 0 Critical/High bugs. 285 tests (QA-independent run), 98.55% coverage. All 13 ACs verified. R1 tripwire solid. StateError propagation AST-verified. dep audit clean. 1 SHALLOW_TC-001 (Low, non-blocking): test_delta_disabled_byte_identical_to_v1 proves idempotency not cross-mode equivalence — covered by code review + count invariant test.

active_concerns: QA should re-verify R1 tripwire tests (test_delta_mixed_new_and_seen_snapshot_before_mark_seen, test_delta_mark_seen_count_invariant_both_modes) stay green through any future edit to _collect_all.

QA should spot-check that no future test_pipeline.py addition reintroduces a bare `mock_state = MagicMock()` without `is_seen.return_value` — silently yields an empty-digest false-pass rather than an error.
AC-V2-001-006 byte-identical guarantee: only the extend() argument differs when delta_enabled=false — verify no other conditional creeps in on future touches.
StateError propagation (AC-V2-001-009) — no try/except exists around is_seen/_partition_new/load; keep it that way.
SHALLOW_TC-001 (Low): future improvement — add cross-mode equivalence test for AC-V2-001-006 (delta_enabled=False over empty state == delta_enabled=True over empty state).

terminology.Delta filter: Pipeline step suppressing items already seen on a previous run.
terminology.Pre-mark_seen snapshot: Seen-checks taken before this run records items, so first-seen-this-run items still appear.
terminology.delta_enabled: Config bool (default true) from [delta] enabled; false == V1 no-suppression.
terminology.Identity-based delta: Suppression keyed on repo+item_type+item_id, not content.
terminology.Bool-trap guard: type(value) is not bool check (not isinstance, since isinstance(True,int) is True); mirrors config.py _validate_lookback.
terminology.Record-vs-render decoupling: delta_enabled changes which items render, never which items mark_seen records (BR-V2-001-002).
terminology.StateError surfacing: Corrupt/unreadable state file raises StateError -> Error: <msg> exit 1; filter never silently disabled (AC-V2-001-009).
terminology._partition_new: Module-private pipeline helper (items, state) -> (new, seen); reads is_seen only, called inline before mark_seen (ADR-001).
terminology.Selection-at-extend: render-list = new if delta_enabled else items, at the extend call; never re-query is_seen after mark_seen (ADR-004).
terminology._validate_delta: config.py helper mirroring _validate_lookback; parses [delta] enabled, raises ConfigError on non-bool (ADR-002).
